title: Fix CI concurrency conflict between push and PR triggers on release branches

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Push to release/* and PR to develop both trigger ci.yml. Concurrency group resolves to same key (CI-release/v0.5.0) for both events via github.head_ref || github.ref_name. cancel-in-progress: true cancels the first run, leaving canceled checks that block merge. Fix: remove release/** from push triggers since PR trigger already covers it.
